div.h1: Build Modern Web Apps with MetaOWL

p.style: font-size: 1.25rem; color: #9ca3af; margin-bottom: 32px; max-width: 42rem; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;

div.p: MetaOWL is a meta-framework for Odoo OWL on Vite. Build powerful, reactive web applications with file-based routing, state management, and SEO optimization.

a.style: padding: 12px 24px; background: #2563eb; color: white; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none;
padding: 12px 24px; background: #374151; color: #e5e7eb; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none;

div.style: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 32px; margin-top: 64px;
padding: 24px; background: #1f2937; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #374151; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
width: 48px; height: 48px; background: #1e3a5f; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 16px;

div.p: Built on Vite for instant hot module replacement.

div.style: padding: 24px; background: #1f2937; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #374151; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
width: 48px; height: 48px; background: #14532d; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 16px;
padding: 24px; background: #1f2937; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #374151; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
width: 48px; height: 48px; background: #2e1065; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 16px;

div.p: Built-in store with mutations and actions.
